fields.helpText: This is the shorthand notation of a lab description.
This field contains a synonym of the name, maximum of 9 characters.
This is the full description of the name (lab description).  It is NOT used for the anatomic pathology descriptions.

fields.setOfCodes: L:LAB;E:AP EM;S:AP SURG;C:AP CYTO;M:MICRO;G:GRAM STAIN;F:FUNGUS;T:TB;P:PARASITE;V:VIRUS;Y:SPUTUM SCREEN;W:SMEAR;A:ORDER;D:BB DISP;R:BB TRANS;X:BB TESTING;Z:BB COLLECT;I:AP GENERAL;J:BB AUDIT;K:GENERAL;B:BB RELEASE;
fields.helpText: This describes the type of screen this lab description is associated with, i.e., gram stain, hematology, microbiology, accession comments, or smear/prep.

This field is available for the user to sort the Lab Descriptions into categories of the users own choosing.  For example, one screened set of descriptions could be divided into a number of different areas for printing on different pages.
This is the correct plural form of the name.

This is a description of the specimen that may be as long as you like.  The FileMan word-processing editor may be used to modify the text.  This is the description that is used for the anatomic pathology options  and NOT the EXPANSION field.
